name: Project Plan - Website Redesign
body:
Phase 1: Discovery (2 weeks)
- User interviews
- Competitive analysis
- Sitemap audit

Phase 2: Design (3 weeks)
- Wireframes
- Visual mockups
- Design review

Phase 3: Development (4 weeks)
- Frontend implementation
- CMS integration
- QA testing

name: Book Recommendations
body:
Fiction:
- The Midnight Library by Matt Haig
- Klara and the Sun by Kazuo Ishiguro

Non-fiction:
- Thinking, Fast and Slow by Daniel Kahneman
- Atomic Habits by James Clear
- The Art of Statistics by David Spiegelhalter

name: Recipe - Pasta Carbonara
body:
Ingredients:
- 400g spaghetti
- 200g guanciale
- 4 egg yolks
- 100g pecorino romano
- Black pepper

Instructions:
1. Cook pasta al dente
2. Crisp guanciale in pan
3. Mix yolks with cheese
4. Toss hot pasta with guanciale
5. Add egg mixture off heat
6. Season with pepper

name: Sprint Retrospective Notes
body:
What went well:
- Shipped feature flags on time
- Good cross-team collaboration
- Zero production incidents

What could improve:
- Too many meetings on Wednesday
- PR review turnaround slow
- Flaky tests still not fixed

Action items:
- Block Wednesday afternoons for focus time
- Set 24h SLA for PR reviews

name: Startup Ideas Brainstorm
body:
1. AI-powered code review tool for small teams
2. Local-first note-taking app with E2E encryption
3. Subscription management dashboard
4. Developer-focused time tracking CLI
5. Open-source feature flag service

Next steps: validate idea #2 with 10 user interviews

name: Home Office Setup
body:
Current setup:
- Desk: Standing desk 160x80
- Monitor: 27" 4K
- Chair: Ergonomic mesh

Upgrades needed:
- Monitor arm (order from vendor)
- Better webcam for video calls
- Acoustic panels for echo reduction
- Cable management tray

Budget: ~$500 total

name: Interview Prep - System Design
body:
Key topics to review:
- Load balancing strategies
- Database sharding patterns
- Caching layers (CDN, app-level, DB-level)
- Message queues vs event streams
- CAP theorem trade-offs

Practice questions:
- Design a URL shortener
- Design a chat system
- Design a rate limiter
- Design a notification service
